case_title: 550 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF 550 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 550 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-21-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF 550 SOUTH VAN NESS HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JAMES WILSON. DEFENDANT RECOLOGY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JAMES HOWELL. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE HEARING WITH THE MEDIATORS. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NOV-21-2019 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,975.00 FILED BY 550 SOUTH VAN NESS AVENUE HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-23-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $132.00 SERVED SEP-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT RECOLOGY SAN FRANCISCO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
